title: Quarto extension providing the corporate identity of the Flemish government for websites
description: This quarto extension builds on the quarto website format and provides the corporate identity of the Flemish government for website. A full example is available in the source folder in the GitHub repo. Visit https://inbo.github.io/flandersqmd-website/ to view the rendered version of the example.
